NEW DELHI: Five-time champions Mumbai Indians will look to begin their IPL 2026 campaign on a strong note when they take on three-time winners Kolkata Knight Riders at the iconic Wankhede Stadium on Sunday. Hardik Pandya will continue to lead MI for the third consecutive season, while Ajinkya Rahane captains KKR in what promises to be an exciting contest.Mumbai Indians enter the season with a clear objective, and that is to clinch their sixth IPL title and end a trophy drought that dates back to 2020. They showed resilience last year by reaching the playoffs, but their journey ended in Qualifier 2 after a loss to Punjab Kings.With a strong core featuring Rohit Sharma, Jasprit Bumrah, Suryakumar Yadav, and Trent Boult, MI look like a balanced and formidable unit on paper, capable of mounting a serious title challenge.On the other hand, Kolkata Knight Riders will aim for a fresh start after a disappointing campaign last season, where they finished eighth despite entering as defending champions. Rahane will rely on key players such as Cameron Green, Sunil Narine, Varun Chakravarthy, and Finn Allen to turn things around.Notably, this season marks a major transition for KKR as they move forward without long-time match-winner Andre Russell, signaling the end of a significant era for the franchise.The match between Mumbai Indians and Kolkata Knight Riders will take place at Wankhede Stadium, Mumbai.The much-anticipated clash is scheduled for Sunday, March 29.The match will begin at 7:30 PM IST.The match will be telecast live on Star Sports Network, while live streaming will be available on JioHotstar across mobile devices, laptops, and smart TVs in multiple languages.Hardik Pandya (Captain), Rohit Sharma, Suryakumar Yadav, Tilak Varma, Ryan Rickleton, Robin Minz, Mitchell Santner, Corbin Bosch, Naman Dhir, Jasprit Bumrah, Trent Boult, Allah Ghafanzar, Ashwani Kumar, Deepak Chahar, Will Jacks, Raghu Sharma, Raj Angad Bawa, Sherfane Rutherford, Mayank Markande, Shardul Thakur, Quinton de Kock, Mohammad Izhar, Danish Malewar, Atharva Ankolekar, Mayank Rawat.Ajinkya Rahane (capt), Manish Pandey, Rovman Powell, Angkrish Raghuvanshi, Ramandeep Singh, Rinku Singh, Sunil Narine, Anukul Roy, Vaibhav Arora, Harshit Rana, Umran Malik, Varun Chakaravarthy, Cameron Green, Finn Allen, Matheesha Pathirana, Kartik Tyagi, Rahul Tripathi, Tim Seifert, Tejasvi Dahiya, Sarthak Ranjan, Rachin Ravindra, Akash Deep, Prashant Solanki, Daksh Kamra.
Article Summary: Five-time champions Mumbai Indians take on three-time winners Kolkata Knight Riders. Match will take place at Wankhede Stadium, Mumbai, on Sunday, March 29. Hardik Pandya will continue to lead MI for the third consecutive season. Ajinkya Rahane captains KKR in what promises to be an exciting contest.

Article Title: Klay Thompson’s girlfriend Megan Thee Stallion turns heads with leather mini skirt and stunning fiddler cap
Article Text:
Megan Thee Stallion. Image via: Jamie McCarthy/WireImage/Getty Images

Klay Thompson’s girlfriend Megan Thee Stallion drops stunning Instagram images



Megan Thee Stallion. Image via: theestallion/ Instagram

Megan Thee Stallion. Image via: Megan Thee Stallion. Image via: theestallion/ Instagram

Megan Thee Stallion on her Broadway debut



Klay Thompson’s girlfriend, Megan Thee Stallion , is not just making noise on stage. Her latest Instagram drop has fans talking for a different reason. The Houston rapper leaned into bold fashion choices that felt both playful and polished, blending classic luxury with her signature edge.The response was instant as fans’ comments poured in. Some focused on the look. Others simply celebrated her presence. And once again, Megan found a way to hold attention without saying much at all.Megan Thee Stallion’s first look carried a sharp mix of structure and attitude. She wore a vintage Christian Dior argyle polo (appears to be pulling from early 2000s fashion) and gave it fresh life. She paired it with a black pleated leather mini skirt that balanced the outfit with a modern, slightly rebellious feel.A black fiddler cap added a subtle statement, while sheer tights and pointed heels kept everything stylish.A soft pink handbag tied the color palette together, while her long, sleek hair and bold red lip gave a strong finish.In another image, Megan leaned into full glamour. A long white faux fur coat with spotted detailing became the centerpiece, layered over a simple white top and low-rise black jeans. Oversized sunglasses added charm to the overall look.Fans noticed everything. “That’s our girl!☺️🔥” one fan shared. Another added, “We had so much fun last night!!! Thank you for an amazing show! 🔥.” Others zeroed in on the outfit itself. “wait this coat 😍😍😍.” And one summed it up simply. “Literally so good!!”Megan is exploring new ground. On March 24, she made her Broadway debut in Moulin Rouge! The Musical, stepping into the role of Zidler. It marked a different kind of spotlight, one that ties back to her early years.“I guess that manifested into me being who I am today, but going back to her putting me in plays when I was young, when I got the opportunity to be a part of Broadway, I was like, 'Wow. I feel like this is something that my mom would've really wanted me to do,” Megan said.She added, “So, loving 'Moulin Rouge!' and knowing that my mom loved theatre, I feel like she saw this for me. I feel like she manifested this for me. So, I feel really excited to do it, and I'm (going to) put my all into it.”From music to fashion to the stage, Megan keeps finding new ways to express herself.
Article Summary: Klay Thompson’s girlfriend Megan Thee Stallion drops stunning Instagram images. The Houston rapper leaned into bold fashion choices that felt both playful and polished. On March 24, she made her Broadway debut in Moulin Rouge! The Musical, stepping into the role of Zidler.

Article Title: Aaron Rodgers Steelers: “Not even close”: Pittsburgh Steelers TJ Watt’s $123M deal under fire as Aaron Rodgers eyes new contract
Article Text:
Pittsburgh Steelers TJ Watt’s $123M deal under fire as Aaron Rodgers eyes new contract(Image via Getty Images)

Pittsburgh Steelers face cap squeeze as Aaron Rodgers' contract demand grows

The Pittsburgh Steelers are stuck in a tough spot heading into the 2026 offseason. Their biggest defensive investment is already locked in. Now, their quarterback situation is pushing the limits.The problem is simple. Pittsburgh may not be able to afford both T. J. Watt at his current price and Aaron Rodgers on a new deal. With limited cap space, every dollar now carries weight.TJ Watt signed a three-year, $123 million extension on July 17, 2025, after skipping mandatory minicamp to push for a new deal. At that point, the move looked fair. He was coming off elite seasons and remained the face of the defense.But things have changed. In March 2026, Bleacher Report analyst Brad Gagnon called Watt one of the most overpaid players on the roster.Gagnon said, “He’s had an incredible career, but Watt’s three-year, $123 million contract makes him the third-highest-paid defensive player in the league.”He further added, “His sack numbers have plummeted in back-to-back campaigns entering his age-32 season. The eight-time Pro Bowler is not even close to being worth that kind of money these days.”The concern is not his legacy. It is his recent dip in production and his age, with the linebacker set to turn 32 in October.The bigger issue is the cap hit. Watt counts roughly $42 million against the cap in 2026. Add DK Metcalf’s $31 million figure, and Pittsburgh has already spent heavily on two players. That leaves about $21.4 million in effective cap space.Now comes the Aaron Rodgers contract situation. Rodgers signed a one-year deal worth $13.65 million for the 2025 season. He earned just over $14 million after incentives. But after throwing for 3,322 yards and 24 touchdowns, his market has shifted.Speaking on the Snap Count podcast in March 2026, former Steelers quarterback Charlie Batch made the situation clear. “The Steelers would like him to come back, yes, but it’s not going to be at that $13 million number,” Batch said on the Snap Count podcast. “I’m sure his representatives want something closer to $30 million, and you hope that, somewhere, you meet in the middle.”That gap is the problem. A $30 million ask stretches Pittsburgh’s budget. It also ties into the ongoing talk about Aaron Rodgers' retirement. At 42, any deal comes with risk, and the team cannot afford a long-term mistake. The Steelers once built their roster around a simple idea. Pay the defense and keep the quarterback cost low. That model no longer works.Now, they must choose. Stick with a high-priced defense led by Watt or adjust the books to bring Rodgers back. Either way, the margin for error is gone.
Article Summary: TJ Watt signed a three-year, $123 million extension on July 17, 2025. Bleacher Report analyst Brad Gagnon called Watt one of the most overpaid players on the roster. Watt counts roughly $42 million against the cap in 2026.

Article Title: Hardik Pandya gifts Mahieka Sharma Mercedes-Benz V-Class worth ₹1.7 crore
Article Text:
Hardik Pandya and Mahieka Sharma (X)

Watch Hardik Pandya Credits Girlfriend Mahieka Sharma After India’s T20 World Cup Glory Hardik Pandya Credits Girlfriend Mahieka Sharma After India’s T20 World Cup Glory

All-rounder Hardik Pandya , captain of Mumbai Indians in IPL 2026, gifted his girlfriend Mahieka Sharma a luxury Mercedes-Benz V-Class car, touted as India’s first of its kind. The vehicle, valued at approximately ₹1.7 crore, marks a lavish gesture from the star India all-rounder.Having made their relationship public in October 2025, Mahieka has frequently accompanied Pandya to public events and stadiums, including celebrations after India’s T20 World Cup 2026 triumph at the Narendra Modi Stadium in Ahmedabad earlier this year.On the field, Pandya’s Mumbai Indians got off to a flying start in the IPL 2026 opener against Kolkata Knight Riders at the Wankhede Stadium. Chasing 221, MI openers Ryan Rickelton (81 off 43 balls) and Rohit Sharma (78 off 38 balls) shared a breezy 148-run opening stand off just 71 balls, handing MI a comfortable six-wicket win and their first opening-match victory in 13 seasons.The chase was completed in 19.1 overs, making it a record successful run chase for MI at their home ground.While Rickelton struck four boundaries and eight sixes, Rohit’s innings included six fours and six maximums. Earlier, KKR’s skipper Ajinkya Rahane (67) and debutant Angkrish Raghuvanshi (51) had laid the foundation for a par total of 220 for 4.Shardul Thakur was the pick of MI’s bowlers, claiming 3 for 39, while senior pacers Trent Boult (0/38) and Jasprit Bumrah (0/35) went wicketless, though Bumrah’s final overs kept KKR from crossing 250.KKR had stormed to 100 inside eight overs, with Rahane looking set for a big score before Thakur’s strikes broke the momentum.
Article Summary: Hardik Pandya gifted his girlfriend Mahieka Sharma a luxury Mercedes-Benz V-Class car. The vehicle, valued at approximately ₹1.7 crore, marks a lavish gesture from the star India all-rounder. Pandya’s Mumbai Indians got off to a flying start in the IPL 2026 opener against KKR.

Sanju Samson is set for an emotional reunion as he faces Rajasthan Royals for the first time since joining Chennai Super Kings, adding a compelling subplot to Monday’s IPL clash in Guwahati. Having been the face of RR for over a decade, leading them to the 2022 final and becoming their all-time leading run-scorer, Samson’s switch marks the end of an era for the Royals.Now in CSK colours, Sanju Samson arrives in top form after a standout T20 World Cup campaign, including three crucial half-centuries. With MS Dhoni sidelined due to injury, Samson is expected to play a key leadership role alongside skipper Ruturaj Gaikwad at the top of the order.The match also sees Ravindra Jadeja facing his former CSK teammates after moving back to RR. Chennai appear to be entering a transition phase, with young talents stepping up and a balanced bowling attack offering depth.For Rajasthan, Samson’s departure signals a fresh start under new captain Riyan Parag. Their batting will hinge on Yashasvi Jaiswal, supported by Shimron Hetmyer, while concerns remain over their bowling consistency.Both teams, coming off disappointing seasons, will look to reset and begin their campaigns on a strong note.A fresh pitch is set to be used for Monday’s clash, though rain on the eve of the match forced it under covers. Showers are forecast for the afternoon, but conditions are expected to improve by evening, raising hopes of a full game. The weather has already disrupted preparations, with Rajasthan Royals’ practice session curtailed. Early moisture could assist bowlers before conditions ease under lights.Yashasvi Jaiswal, Vaibhav Sooryavanshi, Riyan Parag (c), Dhruv Jurel (wk), Shimron Hetmyer, Ravindra Jadeja, Donnovan Ferreira, Jofra Archer, Ravi Bishnoi, Tushar Deshpande, Sandeep Sharma,Impact Sub: Nandre Burger/Adam MilneRuturaj Gaikwad (c), Sanju Samson (wk), Ayush Mhatre, Matt Short, Shivam Dube, Kartik Sharma, Prashant Veer, Jamie Overton, Noor Ahmad, Matt Henry, Khaleel Ahmed,Impact Sub: Anshul Kamboj/Gurjapneet SinghConditions are expected to remain mostly cloudy with a passing shower during the day. The evening is likely to stay humid with lingering cloud cover and a couple of late showers possible. Temperatures will range between 27°C and 19°C. Encouragingly, the probability of rain is expected to drop to around 20% during match hours, improving the chances of uninterrupted play.The RR vs CSK match will be played at the Barsapara Cricket Stadium in Guwahati. The match will start at 7:30 pm. The match will be telecasted on Star Sports Network and live streaming will be on JioHotstar.Riyan Parag (c), Dhruv Jurel, Donovan Ferreira, Lhuan-Dre Pretorius, Ravi Singh, Aman Perala, Shimron Hetmyer, Shubham Dubey, Vaibhav Sooryavanshi, Yashasvi Jaiswal, Ravindra Jadeja, Dasun Shanaka, Adam Milne, Brijesh Sharma, Jofra Archer, Kuldeep Sen, Kwena Maphaka, Nandre Burger, Ravi Bishnoi and Sandeep Sharma.Sanju Samson, Dewald Brevis, Shivam Dube, Ruturaj Gaikwad (c), Ayush Mhatre, Matt Henry, Akeal Hosein, Noor Ahmad, Jamie Overton, Matthew Short, Khaleel Ahmed, Zak Foulkes, Anshul Khamboj, Nathan Ellis, Sarfaraz Khan, Rahul Chahar, Kartik Sharma, Urvil Patel, Aman Khan, Ramakrishna Ghosh, Prashant Veer, Shreyas Gopal, Spencer Johnson, Gurjapneet Singh and Mukesh Choudhary.

Article Title: Record broken! Rohit Sharma dethrones Virat Kohli with KKR carnage
Article Text:
Virat Kohli and Rohit Sharma (Image credit: BCCI/IPL)

Watch Delhi Capitals unveil new jersey ahead of IPL 2026 Delhi Capitals unveil new jersey ahead of IPL 2026

Player Team(s) Matches Runs Opponent Rohit Sharma Deccan Chargers, Mumbai Indians 36 1161 Kolkata Knight Riders Virat Kohli Royal Challengers Bengaluru 36 1160 Chennai Super Kings Virat Kohli Royal Challengers Bengaluru 36 1159 Punjab Kings Virat Kohli Royal Challengers Bengaluru 32 1154 Delhi Capitals David Warner Delhi Capitals, Sunrisers Hyderabad 26 1134 Punjab Kings Shikhar Dhawan Deccan Chargers, Delhi Capitals, Mumbai Indians, Punjab Kings, Sunrisers Hyderabad 30 1105 Chennai Super Kings David Warner Delhi Capitals, Sunrisers Hyderabad 28 1093 Kolkata Knight Riders Rohit Sharma Deccan Chargers, Mumbai Indians 37 1057 Delhi Capitals Virat Kohli Royal Challengers Bengaluru 36 1021 Kolkata Knight Riders

Poll Will Rohit Sharma maintain his form throughout IPL 2026? Yes, definitely Inconsistency expected

NEW DELHI: Rohit Sharma was seen in his true colours, batting in his typical style and dispatching bowlers all over the park with complete authority in IPL 2026 as Mumbai Indians took on Kolkata Knight Riders in their opening match.The decision to bowl first didn’t work for the five-time champions as KKR piled up a daunting 220/4 in 20 overs. But when Rohit walked out to open alongside Ryan Rickelton, the intent was clear - take control of the chase.The duo delivered in style.Rickelton and Rohit slammed quickfire fifties to power Mumbai Indians to a comfortable six-wicket win — their first opening-game victory in 13 seasons.Chasing 221, Rickelton (81 off 43 balls) and Rohit (78 off 38) stitched together a blistering 148-run opening stand off just 71 balls, laying the perfect foundation.Mumbai Indians eventually chased down the target in 19.1 overs, finishing at 224/4. It was their highest successful run chase at home.While Rickelton struck four boundaries and eight sixes, Rohit’s knock was studded with six fours and six maximums, underlining his dominance at the top.In the process, Rohit also surpassed Virat Kohli to register the most runs scored against a single team in IPL history.Rohit now has 1161 runs in 36 matches against KKR, achieved while representing both Deccan Chargers and Mumbai Indians.Kohli, who has spent his entire IPL career with Royal Challengers Bengaluru, had previously held the record with 1160 runs against Chennai Super Kings in 36 matches.Mumbai Indians will now face Delhi Capitals on April 4 at the Arun Jaitley Stadium in Delhi.
Article Summary: Mumbai Indians beat Kolkata Knight Riders by six wickets in their IPL 2026 opener. Rohit Sharma scored an unbeaten 78 as Mumbai chased down the target in 19.1 overs. Sharma surpassed Virat Kohli to register the most runs scored against a single team in IPL history.

Article Title: Rameez Raja questions PSL ball-tampering on air; Afridi says 'we'll check camera'
Article Text:
Rameez Raza and Shaheen Afridi (PSL Photo)

Rameez Raja:

Watch Axar Patel questions Impact Player rule: ‘All-rounders lose value’ Axar Patel questions Impact Player rule: ‘All-rounders lose value’

Afridi:

Poll Should there be stricter rules against ball tampering in cricket? Yes, to maintain fairness No, current rules are sufficient

NEW DELHI: After the ball-tampering scandal rocked the Pakistan Super League (PSL), Lahore Qalandars captain Shaheen Afridi expected the burning question to come his way - and it did. Following Lahore Qalandars’ defeat, Afridi was asked about the dramatic final over that involved alleged ball tampering by his teammate and star opener Fakhar Zaman.Here’s how the post-match presentation conversation went:That last over was quite dramatic, especially with the ball being changed due to suspected ball tampering. Your thoughts on that incident?Actually, I don’t know much about it. We’ll have to check what exactly happened on camera. We’ll discuss it and see who did what, because it did hurt us badly. The five penalty runs made a big difference.But right now, we can’t say much until we are sure.The incident took place during a PSL match between Lahore Qalandars and Karachi Kings, with Fakhar finding himself at the centre of the controversy.The issue surfaced when Lahore Qalandars fast bowler Haris Rauf was set to bowl the final over, with Karachi Kings needing 14 runs for victory.Rauf was preparing to bowl when captain Shaheen Afridi and Fakhar joined him for a brief discussion to chalk out a plan for the final over.What raised eyebrows was that Fakhar appeared to be caught on camera altering the ball.On-field umpire Faisal Afridi then called for the ball, inspected it, and held a lengthy discussion with fellow umpire Sharfuddoula of Bangladesh.After deliberation, the umpires concluded that the ball had been deliberately altered and awarded five penalty runs to Karachi, reducing the target to nine runs off the final six balls.The ball was also changed.Lahore Qalandars eventually lost the match by four wickets.
Article Summary: Shaheen Afridi was asked about alleged ball tampering by his teammate Fakhar Zaman. The incident took place during a PSL match between Lahore Qalandars and Karachi Kings. The ball was changed during the final over, with Karachi needing 14 to win.

Article Title: ‘KKR fully aware’: Cricket Australia forced to clarify on Cameron Green after Rahane’s ‘ask CA’ jibe
Article Text:
Cameron Green's non-availability as a bowler had trigged a sharp response from KKR skipper Ajinkya Rahane (IPL/BCCI)

Watch IPL 2026: Ishan Kishan steals the show at captains meet IPL 2026: Ishan Kishan steals the show at captains meet

Cricket Australia have been forced to put out a clarification on why Australian allrounder Cameron Green is not allowed to bowl for his franchise Kolkata Knight Riders in IPL 2026, after skipper Ajinkya Rahane took a swipe at the Australian board when asked about Green’s abstinence from bowling duties during KKR’s opening fixture against Mumbai Indians at the Wankhede Stadium, Mumbai, on Sunday.KKR failed to defend a total of 220, with Rahane blaming it on the inexperienced bowling unit and the true nature of the Wankhede track - the same strip which saw nearly 500 runs being scored in the T20 World Cup 2026 semifinal between India and England earlier this month.KKR have been grappling with injuries, and Rahane conceded that the non-availability of Green as a bowler dented the team’s balance."I think when hopefully Green starts to bowl soon, the combination will be slightly different," said Rahane during the post-match interaction."At the moment, we have to see the balance and who can bowl well for us. Batting-wise, as I said, we batted really well, but finding that balance with the ball is really important. So, hopefully, Green starts to bowl soon, then we can find out whether the combination will be okay. "And when asked why the 26-year-old was not bowling, he shot back, saying, “That question you need to ask Cricket Australia,” leaving the on-air commentators Ravi Shastri and Kevin Pietersen speechless for a bit.However, Cricket Australia responded to Rahane’s remarks, stating that Green is suffering from a lower back injury and KKR were made fully aware of the situation beforehand.“Cameron has a lower back injury which is being managed but requires him to abstain from bowling for a short period,” a CA spokesperson said, as quoted by FOX Sports.“Cameron is currently rebuilding his bowling loads in India with a view to return in around 10–12 days’ time. KKR has been communicated with and is fully aware of this information,” the report further stated, attributing it to the spokesperson.Green, the most expensive buy of the IPL 2026 auction at INR 25.20 Cr, came out to bat at one-down, scoring 18 off 10 balls, but was not pressed into action with the ball as Mumbai Indians batters made merry against an inexperienced KKR bowling unit. Every KKR bowler was taken to the cleaners by Rohit Sharma and Ryan Rickelton of Mumbai Indians, who combined for an opening stand of 148 in just 11.1 overs.Vaibhav Arora was taken for 52 runs in his four overs, while Blessing Muzarabani leaked 34 runs in his three overs. Kartik Tyagi, the impact sub, returned figures of 4-0-43-1. But the biggest letdown for KKR were their spin twins — Sunil Narine and Varun Chakaravarthy — who proved ineffective on the Wankhede track, giving away 78 runs between them in seven overs.
Article Summary: Cricket Australia have been forced to put out a clarification on why Australian allrounder Cameron Green is not allowed to bowl for his franchise Kolkata Knight Riders in IPL 2026. KKR skipper Ajinkya Rahane took a swipe at the Australian board when asked about Green’s abstinence from bowling duties during KKR's opening fixture against Mumbai Indians.

Article Title: Ball-tampering in PSL! Fakhar Zaman caught on camera, Afridi reacts - WATCH
Article Text:
Shaheen Afridi and Fakhar Zaman (Image credit: X)

Watch IPL 2026 should be audition for the next India T20I captain IPL 2026 should be audition for the next India T20I captain

WATCH:

Poll Who do you think has the most responsibility in preventing ball-tampering? Players Coaches Umpires

NEW DELHI: It seems Pakistan cricket and controversies go hand in hand. Now, a fresh row has erupted - this time over alleged ball-tampering by Pakistan cricketers in the ongoing Pakistan Super League PSL ). The incident took place during a PSL match between Lahore Qalandars and Karachi Kings, with Lahore Qalandars' Fakhar Zaman finding himself at the centre of the controversy.The issue surfaced when Lahore Qalandars fast bowler Haris Rauf was set to bowl the final over, with Karachi Kings needing 14 runs for victory.Rauf was preparing to bowl when captain Shaheen Afridi and Fakhar joined him for a brief discussion to chalk out a plan for the final over.What raised eyebrows was that Fakhar appeared to be caught on camera altering the ball.On-field umpire Faisal Afridi then called for the ball, inspected it, and held a lengthy discussion with fellow umpire Sharfuddoula of Bangladesh.After deliberation, the umpires concluded that the ball had been deliberately altered and awarded five penalty runs to Karachi, reducing the target to nine runs off the final six balls.The ball was also changed.Karachi batter Khushdil Shah holed out off the first delivery of the final over, but Rauf followed it up with a wide. Abbas Afridi then struck a four and a six to seal a four-wicket win for Karachi in 19.3 overs.“Fakhar denied the charge leveled against him during a disciplinary hearing led by the match referee Roshan Mahanama,” the Pakistan Cricket Board said in a statement. “Another hearing is set to take place within the next 48 hours after which the match referee will share his verdict.” If found guilty, the minimum punishment for a Level 3 offense is a one-match ban.
Article Summary: A fresh row has erupted over alleged ball-tampering by Pakistan cricketers. The incident took place during a PSL match between Lahore Qalandars and Karachi Kings. Fakhar Zaman found himself at the centre of the controversy.

Article Title: Let Terrorist Arrest: Delhi Police nab Lashkar-e-Taiba commander Shabbir Ahmed Lone near Bangladesh border
Article Text:
Shabbir Ahmed Lone (File photo)

Watch Hafiz Saeed Link Surfaces As Delhi Police Bust Lashkar e Taiba Module Run From Bangladesh Base Hafiz Saeed Link Surfaces As Delhi Police Bust Lashkar e Taiba Module Run From Bangladesh Base

Poll How should authorities deal with cross-border terror threats? Strong global cooperation & action Stricter border security & monitoring





NEW DELHI: Delhi Police special cell has arrested Lashkar-e-Taiba commander Shabbir Ahmed Lone from near Bangladesh border, sources said. Lone was running a Lashkar cell from his hideout near Dhaka.The operation, monitored closely by police commissioner Satish Golcha, was the result of a cat-and-mouse chase of two months. A special team led by additional CP Pramod Kushwaha, ACP Lalit Negi and inspector Sunil Rajain had been tracking Lone after his role emerged in recruitment of youths for terrorist activities in Delhi, Kolkata and Tamil Nadu.Lone was earlier arrested by Delhi Police on terror charges in 2007.He fled to Bangladesh after getting bail in 2019 and had become a headache for the security agencies and Delhi’s ATS after it emerged that he had set up a terror cell in that country.However, he is not the only terror kingpin with Delhi links who the agencies are after.Besides Lone, the agencies are now aggressively trying to locate Sheikh Sajjad Gul who was arrested from Nizamuddin station in Delhi in 2002 and was lodged in Tihar for over a decade after being convicted in 2003.He was sentenced to 10 years before being released in 2017. Gul also fled to Pakistan around the same time and is now at the helm of Lashkar’s new face, The Resistance Front (TRF), which has been behind several terror strikes including the Pahalgam attack.
Article Summary: Shabbir Ahmed Lone was running a Lashkar cell from his hideout near Dhaka. The operation, monitored closely by police commissioner Satish Golcha, was the result of a cat-and-mouse chase of two months. Lone was earlier arrested by Delhi Police on terror charges in 2007.

Article Title: Rahul Arunoday Banerjee Death: 'Hit by a wave': Bengali actor Rahul Arunoday Banerjee dies while shooting for series in Odisha
Article Text:
Cops: Will probe if safety protocol was followed at shoot





DIGHA/KOLKATA: Actor Rahul Arunoday Banerjee (43), a popular face in the Bengali film, OTT and television industry, died on Sunday while shooting for a series called 'Bhole Baba Paar Karega' off the Talsari beach in Odisha , around 8km from Digha.Subhashis Mondal, director of the series, said, "The shoot had ended and most of the cast left, but Rahul-da insisted on an unscripted drone shot. We were filming honeymoon scenes with Rahul-da and Sweta (Mishra) in knee-deep water. The first take was completed. Sweta felt uneasy after a small wave hit her and decided to leave. Rahul-da wanted a second take with him facing the camera and went deeper into the water. The entire team requested him (to come out of water), but he didn't listen.A bigger wave caused him to slip and swallow water. We all jumped to rescue him. Lifeguards also joined in the rescue operation and he was rushed to a hospital. He responded twice while being taken to the hospital, but was pronounced dead upon arrival.""He was brought to the hospital around 6.10pm. He had passed away by the time our doctors examined him," said a senior doctor at Digha State General Hospital.Cops from Digha coastal police station reached the hospital soon after receiving the news."He was brought in a lifeless state," said an officer.While primary evidence points towards a heart attack followed by drowning, we need to go through the post-mortem report to know the cause of death. An unnatural death case has been registered. We are questioning crew members to know the sequence of events and trying to find out whether the safety protocol was followed during the shoot," said a senior police officer in East Midnapore district. Cops said the body has been kept at the Digha hospital morgue. The post-mortem will take place at Contai Sub-divisional Hospital on Monday morning.Rahul Arunoday Banerjee had made his debut in the 2009 movie 'Chirodini Tumi Je Amar'. He later married his co-star, Priyanka Sarkar. He acted in multiple movies and TV serials and became a household name. He also ran a popular podcast channel Shojoj Kotha, named after his 13-year-old son Shohoj.Shortly after his death, CM Mamata Banerjee posted on X: "This news has left me stunned, heartbroken, and grief-stricken. I just can't make sense of how this happened. He was one of my favourite actors and a wonderful person. I extend my heartfelt condolences to his bereaved family, loved ones, and countless admirers. Rahul's sudden departure is an irreparable loss for the Bengali acting world, Tollywood, and Tellywood. "Raj Chakraborty, who directed 'Chirodini Tumi Je Amar', said: He played a character that was completely different from the larger-than-life heroes Bengali cine-goers were used to watching back then. It is unfortunate that he didn't reach his zenith."Actor Sudipta Chakraborty, said, "Rahul had a heart of gold. He stood up for me and voiced his opinion against internet hooliganism." His filmography, which includes major titles like 'Jackpot', 'Jaatishwar', 'Zulfiqar', and his recurring role as Ajit in the 'Byomkesh' franchise, showcases a range that few can match, said industry veterans.He was equally at home in the ensemble cast of 'Chotushkone' as he was leading the experimental 'Rajlokhi O Srikanto', proving that his talent was not bound by genre or scale.
Article Summary: Rahul Arunoday Banerjee (43) died on Sunday while shooting for a series called 'Bhole Baba Paar Karega' off the Talsari beach in Odisha. He was a popular face in the Bengali film, OTT and television industry.

Article Title: Travis Hunter Divorce: Is Travis Hunter divorcing Leanna Lenee? Truth behind viral $1.5M child support rumor revealed
Article Text:
(Image via IG)

Travis Hunter’s marriage to Leanna Lenee targeted by fake viral claims



In the age of social media, stardom often comes with a side of fabricated drama. The latest target? NFL sensation and former Heisman winner Travis Hunter. A viral screenshot recently set the internet ablaze, claiming that Hunter’s marriage to Leanna Lenee has come to a screeching halt, complete with a staggering $1.5 million monthly child support settlement.While the headline is designed to stop your scroll, a closer look reveals that this "news" is far more fiction than fact. Here is the reality behind the rumors currently circulating about the Hunter family.First, it is important to clarify the couple’s status. Travis and Leanna officially tied the knot on May 24, 2025, in a beautiful ceremony in Tennessee. Since then, the couple has been navigating the high-pressure world of professional sports while expanding their family.In August 2025, they welcomed their first child, a son, further solidifying their bond.Despite the "divorce" headlines, there are currently no official court filings in Florida where Hunter plays for the Jacksonville Jaguars or in Tennessee. In fact, just days before these rumors peaked, the couple was spotted enjoying a family vacation at Disneyland, sharing photos that showed a united and happy front.The most glaring red flag in the viral report is the financial figure.The claim that Hunter is paying $1.5 million per month in child support is, quite simply, mathematically impossible for a player at his career stage. Even the highest-paid veterans in NFL history do not see child support figures nearing that mark.This specific number has been traced back to parody accounts known for "rage-baiting" posting intentionally false content to drive engagement and clicks. Earlier also these accounts used AI-generated videos/voiceover to make it appear as though Hunter is discussing a breakup, when the original footage actually shows him talking about his training regimen.These rumors showed Leanna Lenee in tears which was an old video, being used out of context. Many of these clips date back to 2024, where Leanna spoke candidly with her followers about her mental health and the spiritual journey she was undertaking. Repurposing these vulnerable moments to fit a "divorce" narrative is a common tactic used by gossip blogs.Travis Hunter and Leanna Lenee remain happily married. While the life of an NFL superstar will always be subject to public scrutiny, this particular story is a masterclass in how quickly misinformation can spread.
Article Summary: Travis Hunter and Leanna Lenee remain happily married. Despite the "divorce" headlines, there are currently no official court filings in Florida where Hunter plays for the Jacksonville Jaguars or in Tennessee. Just days before these rumors peaked, the couple was spotted enjoying a family vacation at Disneyland, sharing photos that showed a united and happy front.

Article Title: Stephen Curry: “Feel sorry for him”: Fans react as Ayesha Curry’s “disrespectful” comment about Stephen Curry goes viral
Article Text:
Stephen Curry and Ayesha Curry. Image via: Ayesha Curry/ Instagram

How Ayesha Curry’s childhood story about Stephen Curry turned into a viral controversy



Ayesha Curry is no stranger to the internet’s microscope, but her latest headline has sparked a particularly fierce debate. After a recent appearance on the "IMO with Michelle Obama & Craig Robinson" podcast, a specific quote went viral: “Very disrespectful on my part. ” While many on social media interpreted this as a current apology for a marriage in crisis, the actual context is far more innocent and far more distant.During the podcast, Ayesha and Steph sat down with the former First Lady to discuss their 15-year marriage. Ayesha recalled a specific journal entry she wrote when she was 14 years old. As a self-described "theater nerd," she had written in capital letters that she would never date an athlete, believing the "jock stereotype" to be arrogant and rude.Reflecting on those childhood misconceptions while sitting next to her husband, she laughed, calling her younger self’s snap judgment “very disrespectful.” She clarified that her disinterest back then was actually a defense mechanism; she assumed a "cool athlete" like Steph wouldn't be interested in a "nerdy girl" like her.The internet, however, skipped the "14-year-old" context. This created a narrative of a wife who is perpetually ungrateful for her legendary husband.And fans did not let it slide, the reactions were swift and brutal. Some users expressed exhaustion, claiming Steph’s legendary career shouldn't be overshadowed by his wife's "embarrassing" comments.Some went as far as claiming Ayesha is "toxic" and trying to "destroy" Steph’s image by bringing up their age when they met despite the couple being the same age and meeting at a church youth group.Some fans even went as far as questioning Stephen’s choice, asking why he chose Ayesha and what he truly sees in her.What began as a lighthearted story about middle-school drama has been weaponized into a commentary on modern marriage. While Ayesha was poking fun at the misconceptions of a 14-year-old, the internet reacted as if she had insulted the NBA’s greatest shooter to his face in the present day.As the "Curry vs. The Internet" cycle continues, this latest incident proves that on social media, a 20-year-old childhood memory can be transformed into a "disrespectful" headline in less than 280 characters.
Article Summary: Ayesha Curry made a comment about her 14-year-old self on a podcast. The internet interpreted it as an apology for a marriage in crisis. The actual context is far more innocent and far more distant. Some users expressed exhaustion, claiming Steph’s career shouldn't be overshadowed.

Article Title: Jaylen Brown Injury Update: Jaylen Brown ruled out with Achilles injury: How serious is it? Breaking down the risk for Boston
Article Text:
Image - X

Jaylen Brown ruled out with Achilles tendinitis as Celtics take playoff-first approach



In the world of the Boston Celtics, there is no word more terrifying than "Achilles." On Friday, that fear became a reality for the Green Team’s faithful when All-Star Jaylen Brown was officially ruled out for a pivotal matchup against the Atlanta Hawks.What started as a seemingly minor report of "left calf tightness" on Thursday was downgraded just hours before tip-off to left Achilles tendinitis. For a fan base that has spent the better part of a year watching Jayson Tatum recover from an Achilles rupture, the news felt like a cruel case of déjà vu.The first thing fans need to understand is the difference between tendinitis and a tear. Tendinitis is essentially inflammation, the body’s way of saying the tendon is overworked and needs a break.It is a common "overuse" injury for explosive athletes like Brown, who rely on jumping and quick lateral movements.While it is not a season-ending injury, it is a significant "red flag." If left untreated, chronic tendinitis can weaken the tendon, making it more susceptible to a serious rupture. By sitting Brown against the Hawks, the Celtics medical staff is choosing a "better safe than sorry" approach, prioritizing the upcoming 2026 playoffs over a late-March regular-season win.There is a silver lining for Brown’s individual accolades. Just before this injury sidelined him, Brown officially played his 65th game of the season. Under the NBA’s current rules, this makes him eligible for season-end awards like MVP and All-NBA.Brown has been the undisputed engine of the Celtics' offense this year, averaging a career-high 28.6 points per game. Having already hit that 65-game mark, both Brown and the Celtics now have the luxury of being extremely cautious with his recovery without worrying about his eligibility for the honors he has clearly earned.With Brown sidelined, the pressure shifts back to Jayson Tatum, who is still working his way back into a full rhythm after his own Achilles journey. The Celtics are currently battling the New York Knicks for the No. 2 seed in the Eastern Conference, and every game counts.However, the team knows that a "Banner 19" run is impossible without a healthy Jaylen Brown. Expect the Celtics to use the "RICE" method (Rest, Ice, Compression, and Elevation) aggressively over the next week. While the word "Achilles" will always cause a panic in Boston, this move appears to be a calculated decision to ensure that the "Jays" are both standing tall when the postseason begins in April.
Article Summary: Jaylen Brown ruled out with Achilles tendinitis as Celtics take playoff-first approach. Tendinitis is essentially inflammation, the body’s way of saying the tendon is overworked and needs a break. The Celtics are currently battling the New York Knicks for the No. 2 seed in the Eastern Conference.

Article Title: Tom Brady: “You crave it…”: Tom Brady’s cryptic words raise eyebrows days after he reportedly broke things off with Alix Earle
Article Text:
Tom Brady’s cryptic words raise eyebrows days after he reportedly broke things off with Alix Earle.(Image via Getty Images)

Tom Brady makes a mysterious post after ending things with Alix Earle



Tom Brady’s dating life has been a mess ever since he split from ex wife Gisele Bündchen



Tom Brady, the NFL legend, has had a pretty troubled love life after he split from his ex wife in 2022.While his ex wife, the popular supermodel Gisele Bündchen, moved on in her life with a new husband, Tom Brady recently went through a break up with popular social media influencer, Alix Earle. Amid all the mess, the NFL legend has recently shared a few words which might hint at what he is feeling now.A few hours ago, the seven time Super Bowl champion Tom Brady took to his Instagram story to share a pretty cryptic post.The post read as, “Be the one they never saw coming…Be patient, but never wait. Be ruthless in your work, but calm in your mind. Be disciplined, but unpredictable.”The post added, “Most fear the grind. You crave it…You weren’t made to compete.You were made to take over.”While it is not clear what Tom Brady is hinting at, the NFL legend did not add any words of his own to his post.Over the last few years, though Tom Brady’s net worth has increased significantly due to his passion for his career, his personal life has been through a lot.As Tom Brady’s ex wife, Brazilian supermodel Gisele Bündchen, found a new boyfriend just months after their divorce in 2022, the NFL legend was linked to many women but the romance rumors fizzled out in just weeks.The list of women includes supermodel Irina Shayk, Sydney Sweeney, Yael Cohen, Kim Kardashian and most recently, Alix Earle.Tom Brady and 25 year old popular social media influencer, Alix Earle, romance rumors had fans rooting for the two as many believed that the NFL legend was serious about their potential romance.But there were reports of the Super Bowl champion feeling that his “privacy was invaded” and his family disapproving of their romance.A few days ago, as per reports, sources have revealed that the NFL legend, Tom Brady broke off things with Alix Earle even though the two saw it as a “casual” relationship.While Tom Brady was linked to Yael Cohen after that, it seems that romance has fizzled out too.For now, it seems all Tom Brady has been focusing on are his three children and his successful career.
Article Summary: Tom Brady has had a troubled love life since his divorce from Gisele Bündchen in 2022. The NFL legend has been linked to many women including Irina Shayk, Sydney Sweeney, Yael Cohen, Kim Kardashian and most recently, Alix Earle. Article Title: Laura Loomer: Candace Owens fires back at Laura Loomer over George Farmer claim as viral arrest record claim sparks intense online backlash
Article Text:
Candace Owens fires back at Laura Loomer over George Farmer claim as viral arrest record claim sparks intense online backlash (Image via Getty)

Candace Owens strongly denies Laura Loomer’s claims about George Farmer as viral arrest record sparks debate

Watch Candace Owens Questions Erika Kirk’s Past, Drops Kanye West Angle Candace Owens Questions Erika Kirk’s Past, Drops Kanye West Angle





Candace Owens found herself at the center of a fast-moving online fight after a serious claim about her husband, George Farmer, started spreading on social media. The claim came from Laura Loomer, who posted what she said was an arrest record and asked if it belonged to Farmer. Within hours, the post picked up attention, and people began arguing over whether the claim was real or misleading. Candace Owens quickly stepped in and rejected the accusation. She said the document being shared did not match her husband and accused Loomer of leaving out key details. The situation turned into a wider debate about how fast unverified claims can spread online and affect someone’s name.The issue began when Laura Loomer shared a document online and tagged Candace Owens directly.She asked if the record belonged to George Farmer, Owens’ husband. The post quickly gained traction, with thousands of views and comments.This was not the first time Loomer raised questions about someone with the same name. Earlier in 2025, she had pointed to a separate case in Tennessee involving a DUI with a similar name. That past mention added fuel to the latest claims, even though no clear link was confirmed.Owens responded soon after and pushed back hard. She wrote:“Hey Laura!No, it’s not. Which is why you cut out the eye color, skin color and hair color.”The main point of her response established that the document lacked essential information. She demonstrated that the missing key identifiers made the evidence base untrustworthy. The public shared her response widely while her supporters who backed her claimed that the post contained false information.The exchange developed into two separate social media reaction groups. Users described the claim as unreasonable because they believed it required evidence before making such serious accusations.The situation required additional examination before reaching a decision about its validity according to some individuals. People who wanted to remain neutral about the matter presented their doubts about the speed at which these allegations became widespread. Political commentators also joined the conversation. The majority of the participants described online disputes between public figures as more intense because these disputes usually develop into major public arguments.The investigation has not produced any authenticated evidence which connects the released document to Candace Owens' husnand George Farmer. The current situation presents two opposing claims that compete with each other while the accusation remains unverified.
Article Summary: Laura Loomer posted what she said was an arrest record and asked if it belonged to George Farmer. Within hours, the post picked up attention, and people began arguing over whether the claim was real or misleading. Candace Owens quickly stepped in and rejected the accusation. She said the document being shared did not match her husband.

Article Title: Gisele Bündchen: Gisele Bündchen finds ‘more meaningful’ life after Tom Brady as she moves on with Joaquim Valente
Article Text:
Gisele Bündchen has reportedly found deeper happiness after marrying Joaquim Valente in a private ceremony. Following her split from Tom Brady, she now embraces a peaceful, family-focused life in Florida. Sources say marriage feels “more meaningful,” with her prioritizing her children, wellness, and work on her own terms.

Gisele Bündchen finds deeper happiness after Tom Brady split and new marriage





Gisele Bündchen's life has become quieter and more grounded, and those closest to her say the change feels very deliberate. Months after privately tying the knot with Joaquim Valente, the supermodel is said to be embracing a slower rhythm built around family, wellness, and purpose. The change is not loud or flashy. Instead, it reflects a woman who has stepped away from constant spotlight pressure and chosen a life that feels calm and complete.Insiders describe this new chapter as more than just a marriage. It is a reset. After years of balancing global fame, motherhood, and a high-profile relationship, Bündchen appears to have found something steadier. Her days now revolve around her children, her partner, and a lifestyle that values presence over pace.According to PEOPLE, the wedding itself may have been private, but its emotional impact has been significant. "It [marriage] didn't change their day-to-day life in a big way, but it made things feel more meaningful," the source says of the couple."It was a very special moment for them to celebrate with close family and friends. They'll joke about it and say, 'Now we've been married for two months, now three months.' It's still new, but it already feels like they've built so much together in a short time."That sense of fulfillment extends beyond romance. "She's incredibly happy. Everything feels like it's come together," the source says. "The kids are thriving, and she's so grateful to be a mom again." Her home life in Florida now centers on simple joys."She's created a life that feels very peaceful. It's a slower, more intentional pace, and it's exactly what she wants. It's an amazing lifestyle for the whole family. It's very focused on wellness. They spend a lot of time outside. They love going for walks, paddleboarding and just being active together."While family remains her priority, Bündchen has not stepped away from her career entirely. "She still loves working, but it's on her terms now," the source says. "It has to fit into her life, not the other way around."Her journey to this place has not been without change. Gisele Bündchen’s previous marriage to Tom Brady lasted over a decade and brought two children into her life. The transition from that chapter to her present one has shaped her outlook. Today, her focus is clear. Stability, family, and a sense of meaning now define what success looks like.
Article Summary: Gisele Bündchen has reportedly found deeper happiness after marrying Joaquim Valente in a private ceremony. Sources say marriage feels “more meaningful,” with her prioritizing her children, wellness, and work on her own terms. After years of balancing global fame, motherhood, and a high-profile relationship, she appears to have found something steadier.

Article Title: Emma Bates: Who is Emma Bates? US marathon runner pregnancy revelation triggers UCan dispute as timeline clash raises serious questions
Article Text:
Who is Emma Bates? US marathon runner pregnancy revelation triggers UCan dispute as timeline clash raises serious questions (Image via Getty)

Emma Bates and UCan dispute over pregnancy claim brings back past issues faced by Alysia Montaño and Allyson Felix





Emma Bates has made a serious claim, and it has quickly caught attention across the running world. The American marathon runner said her longtime sponsor, UCan, dropped her soon after she told them she was pregnant. Bates, who is 33, shared this in a social media video on Tuesday, saying she has now been trying new energy gels after losing that deal. She had worked with the company for three years. But according to her, things changed right after she shared her pregnancy news. Bates had announced on March 5 that she and her partner, runner Steve Finley, are expecting a baby. What makes this even more surprising is that she had already run the Valencia Marathon while in the early stage of her pregnancy, finishing with a time of 2:25:51.However, UCan has strongly pushed back on her claim and shared a very different version of what happened.UCan said the decision to end its partnership with Emma Bates was made in September 2025, months before they knew about her pregnancy. In a statement, the company said this was part of normal business planning. They also said they offered her a new deal, but she chose not to accept it.Bates’ representative, Matt Sonnenfeldt from Flynn Sports Management, told Front Office Sports that talks continued even after September.He said the company made an offer in December and later changed it, which does not match UCan’s timeline.Emma Bates is one of the top long-distance runners in the United States. She finished second at the Chicago Marathon 2021 and placed eighth at the Boston Marathon last year. Her personal best of 2:23:18 ranks among the fastest in US history.She also works with Asics, which confirmed to Front Office Sports that her contract stays the same during her pregnancy. The company said it supports athletes through pregnancy and their return to racing.This situation has brought back memories of past cases. Runner Alysia Montaño once raced while eight months pregnant and later spoke out against Nike for not supporting her financially during that time. She later moved to Asics but said her pay was still reduced when her performance dropped.Olympian Allyson Felix also shared in a 2019 New York Times article that Nike wanted to cut her pay by 70 percent after she became a mother. She described it as a “terrifying time” while dealing with contract talks and a difficult pregnancy.After these stories became public, many companies reviewed how they treat female athletes during pregnancy. Now, Emma Bates’ case is again raising the same questions about support, fairness, and trust between athletes and sponsors.
Article Summary: US marathon runner Emma Bates said her longtime sponsor, UCan, dropped her soon after she told them she was pregnant. UCan has strongly pushed back on her claim and shared a very different version of what happened. Bates had already run the Valencia Marathon while in the early stage of her pregnancy, finishing with a time of 2:25:51.

Article Title: PSL hotel security breach! 4 'guests' till 1:25 am; player says 'Afridi ne koi manmani ... '
Article Text:
Image credit: PSL

What exactly happened?

Watch RCB’s big changes ahead of IPL: New rules, tribute & squad update RCB’s big changes ahead of IPL: New rules, tribute & squad update

What is Raza saying?

Pakistan cricket is already grappling with an embarrassing ball-tampering controversy involving Fakhar Zaman , Shaheen Shah Afridi and Haris Rauf during a Pakistan Super League PSL ) match. Now, another issue has added to their troubles. Lahore Qalandars captain Shaheen Afridi and overseas player Sikandar Raza have been accused of breaching team security protocols at their hotel.Despite prior warnings and refusals, Shaheen and Sikandar were reportedly found hosting four guests in Raza’s room on the eighth floor until 1:25 a.m., according to police officials.The team owner also approached PSL CEO Salman Naseer with the same request, which was again rejected on security grounds.Muhammad Faisal, DIG (Operations, Lahore), reportedly notified the PSL CEO about the serious breach of security measures.Two requests were made by the Lahore Qalandars’ liaison officer seeking permission to allow guests into Raza’s room - first at around 10:35 p.m. and again at 11:00 p.m. on Saturday - but both were denied.Despite this, Shaheen and Raza were seen hosting the guests in the Zimbabwe cricketer’s room, where they stayed until 1:25 a.m.According to reports, at around 11:05 p.m., PCB and security personnel noted that Shaheen and Raza went ahead and escorted the four guests into the room despite resistance from on-site security staff.The guests remained there until 1:25 a.m.A senior police official has informed the Pakistan Cricket Board (PCB) that this incident constitutes a violation of the board’s security protocols and code of conduct, which are designed to ensure the safety and integrity of players, officials and associated personnel.Raza addressed the issue during the post-match press conference and denied the allegations."Shaheen ne koi manmani nahi kari. Meri hi request thi, Maine kaha tha meri family and friends aaye hai. Pehle 4 saalo me aisa kuch bhi nahi tha. Mujhe mere family aur relatives ko milne ki ijazat thi. Ab agar ye SOPs the toh iska na mujhe aur to some extent Shaheen bhi aware nahi tha [He did not force anyone. In fact it was my request as it was my family and frieends. In previous four years, there was never a restriction on meeting my family and relatives. If the SOPs have changes, neither me not to an extent was Shaheen aware of the same," Raza said in a press conference.
Article Summary: Lahore Qalandars captain Shaheen Afridi and overseas player Sikandar Raza have been accused of breaching team security protocols at their hotel. Despite prior warnings and refusals, they were reportedly found hosting four guests in Raza’s room on the eighth floor until 1:25 a.m., according to police officials.

Article Title: 'Enough hopping': Hardik Pandya wants Shardul Thakur to finish career at Mumbai Indians
Article Text:
Mumbai Indians skipper Hardik Pandya hugs Shardul Thakur during their match against Kolkata Knight Riders. (Pic credit: IPL)

Go Beyond The Boundary with our YouTube channel.

Watch Hardik Pandya & Kieron Pollard Address MI Fans in Aamchi Mumbai Hardik Pandya & Kieron Pollard Address MI Fans in Aamchi Mumbai

MI end 13-year

opening-match jinx

NEW DELHI: Mumbai Indians ’ long wait for a winning start to an IPL season finally ended at the Wankhede Stadium on Sunday, and skipper Hardik Pandya ’s heartfelt message to pace bowling all-rounder Shardul Thakur stole the spotlight after a commanding six-wicket win over Kolkata Knight Riders.Thakur, who returned impressive figures of 3/39 in a high-scoring contest, played a decisive role in restricting Kolkata to 220/4. His performance earned him the Player-of-the-Match award, but it was Pandya’s candid remark on his future that added a compelling layer to the evening.“I told him this season, I said, ‘enough hopping of the franchises. I want you to be here for the rest of your career,’” Pandya said after the match.“He’s a character. He has a big heart. The way he comes out and kind of always tries to outsmart a batter, simply brilliant and really happy for him.”Having represented seven franchises across his IPL journey, Thakur’s nomadic career could now find stability at Mumbai if his captain has his way. The 34-year-old has featured in 106 matches, picking up 110 wickets while contributing valuable lower-order runs at a brisk strike rate.Pandya also reflected on the significance of the result itself, as Mumbai Indians snapped a 13-year streak of losing their opening match. “It’s been a long wait — 13 years is a long time. Very glad, the whole team is very glad that we were finally able to do it,” he said.The chase was anchored by a blistering opening stand between Rohit Sharma (78 off 38) and Ryan Rickelton (81 off 43), who added 148 runs to put Mumbai firmly in control of the 221-run chase. Despite a brief slowdown in the middle overs, Pandya (18 not out) and Tilak Varma ensured the hosts crossed the line with five balls to spare.Earlier, Kolkata were powered by half-centuries from Ajinkya Rahane (67) and Angkrish Raghuvanshi (51), with Finn Allen providing early impetus. However, Thakur’s timely breakthroughs prevented the visitors from pushing beyond reach.
Article Summary: Mumbai Indians beat Kolkata Knight Riders by six wickets in IPL opener. Hardik Pandya tells Shardul Thakur he wants him to stay at Mumbai for the rest of his career. Mumbai end 13-year streak of losing their opening match.

Article Title: H-1B Lottery: H-1B lottery results FY 2027 out: USCIS's first wage-based selections done. What's next?
Article Text:
Immigration firms confirmed Friday that the H-1B lottery for FY 2027 results began coming in.



Watch U.S. Rewrites H-1B Rules, Setback To Indian Workers; Check Who Is Eligible & Changes | WATCH U.S. Rewrites H-1B Rules, Setback To Indian Workers; Check Who Is Eligible & Changes | WATCH

Is there a possibility of a second, third lottery?

What is the new Form I-129?





The lottery results for the H-1B visa program FY 2027 started coming in on Friday, immigration attorneys confirmed, adding that not all results are out and it will come through the weekend, but before April 1, as from April 1, the employers will have to start filing petitions for their selected candidates. This was the first time that the USCIS conducted a wage-based lottery and not a random lottery amid the H-1B applications. Immigration attorney Emily Neumann said the selection notice comes to the employers or the attorneys if the employers work with the attorneys and there is no way a candidate can know whether they have been selected unless the law firm or the employers inform them."USCIS has started uploading H-1B lottery selection notices in myUSCIS accounts.We have not received the usual email notification yet, but when logging in, we are able to see some selections. This will likely continue over the weekend and into next week. Those selected can begin filing on April 1, 2026 and must use the new version of the I-129 form, which now requests information regarding the education, experience, skills, and level of supervision required for the position," Neumann said.The USCIS has not yet published the number of registrations and the number of selected candidates.After the employers file petitions for the selected candidates, the USCIS checks whether the 85,000 cap is full and then announces a second lottery. Neumann said it's possible that a second lottery takes place this year as many employers may not file petitions for selected candidates if they are outside of the US as to hire them, the companies will have to pay a $100,000 fee. In FY 2025, a second lottery was conducted. In FY 2026, no second lottery took place.The updated Form I-129 now asks employers to provide detailed information about the minimum requirements of the position that are used to determine the wage level on the Labor Condition Application (LCA). Employers are also required to disclose the minimum educational requirements for the role, the required field of study, any minimum experience requirements, and whether the position involves supervisory duties.
Article Summary: The lottery results for the H-1B visa program FY 2027 started coming in on Friday, immigration attorneys confirmed. This was the first time that the USCIS conducted a wage-based lottery and not a random lottery. Those selected can begin filing on April 1, 2026.

The night Amy Bradley vanished
